title: Historical Archives of Niš
summary: The Historical Archives of Niš (Serbian: Историјски архив Ниш) are the primary institution responsible for preservation of archival materials in the Nišava District located in Niš, Serbia. The archives are primarily covering municipalities of Niš, Merošina, Sokobanja, Ražanj, Doljevac, Aleksinac, Svrljig, and Gadžin Han. The oldest documents kept at the archives are related to Habsburg occupation of Serbia in 1730s.
